principles: Backend authorization is authoritative for protected data and mutations.
Frontend gates mirror backend policy and must use backend capability metadata for migrated action affordances.
Frontend-only permission checks are route/session guards or documented gaps, not mutation authority.
Policy-changing diffs must update this contract and the matching test guidance.

actions.action: List access users and scoped department users
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin, CRO, global scoped users, and department heads according to access workflow policy
actions.backend_authority: backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/access.py uses the access workflow policy and returns AccessUserRead with backend capabilities
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities on each AccessUserRead
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/UsersTable.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/AccessUserRow.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/usersTablePresentation.ts

actions.action: Update identity, role, business access, active status, and break-glass state
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin owns identity/Admin-role fields; CRO owns business access fields; backend capabilities narrow per target user
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/access/AccessEditModal.tsx resolves backend AccessUserCapabilities without permission fallback

actions.action: List paginated user directory mode entries and role facets
actions.actor_scope: Requires users:read; visible user universe is scoped by backend user visibility policy
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/user.py UserDirectoryCapabilities plus backend-provided available_roles facets
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/BusinessRouteGuards.tsx, frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/UserNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/users/useUsersPageData.ts, and frontend/src/pages/users/useUserNewPageAccess.ts

actions.action: Search directory users, read directory profile details, import directory users, and administer directory deprovision/break-glass lifecycle
actions.actor_scope: Admin-only for directory search/import and admin directory lifecycle; CRO/Risk Manager users with users:read cannot import directory users
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities.can_break_glass_enable for access review surfaces; directory import responses expose lifecycle result fields, not action capability objects
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/UserNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/users/UserNewDirectoryImportSection.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/AccessEditModal.tsx, and frontend/src/components/access/

actions.action: Read risk lists, detail, lookups, linked controls, and linked vendors
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read plus department, owner, or linked-entity visibility helpers
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk.py and backend/app/schemas/__init__.py RiskCapabilities on RiskRead, RiskSummary, and RiskListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a risks:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/, frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts, frontend/src/components/risks/RiskDetailOverviewTab.tsx, and frontend/src/components/risks/detail-overview/ use backend capabilities and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Create and update risks, including approval-required sensitive changes
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write; sensitive/high-risk updates use can_resolve_approvals or queue approval
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk.py RiskCapabilities.can_update, can_update_sensitive_fields, can_request_update_approval, can_create_kri, can_create_linked_control, can_link_controls, can_unlink_controls, and can_create_issue
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskEditPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/, frontend/src/components/risks/RiskDetailOverviewTab.tsx, and frontend/src/components/risks/detail-overview/ use backend capabilities; direct create/edit routes load collection/detail capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.action: Archive, restore, and delete-approval request
actions.actor_scope: Delete permission plus delete authorization helper; privileged approvers may execute immediately
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk.py RiskCapabilities.can_archive_immediately, can_request_archive_approval, can_restore, has_pending_delete_approval, and requires_privileged_delete_approval
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RiskDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/riskColumns.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/RisksTableSection.tsx, frontend/src/components/LinkManagementDialog.tsx, and frontend/src/components/linking/LinkSearchResultItem.tsx use backend capabilities

actions.action: Read control lists, detail, linked risks, and monitoring context
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:read plus department/linked-risk visibility helpers
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_control_execution/, backend/app/core/_permissions/entity_access.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; control list and linked-risk responses use set-based visible_risk_ids for linked-risk redaction
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/control.py ControlCapabilities on detail/list serialization and ControlListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a controls:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/ControlDetailPage.tsx and controls components, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/controls/, and frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts use backend read authority and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Create, update, link risks, unlink risks, archive, and restore controls
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:write or controls:delete depending on action; sensitive updates can queue approvals
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/control.py ControlCapabilities.can_update, can_update_sensitive_fields, can_request_update_approval, can_link_risk, can_unlink_risk, can_archive_immediately, can_request_archive_approval, can_restore, and can_create_issue
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/ControlNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ControlEditPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ControlDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/controls/, frontend/src/components/LinkManagementDialog.tsx, and frontend/src/components/linking/LinkSearchResultItem.tsx use backend capabilities; direct create/edit routes load collection/detail capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.action: Log and read control executions
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:execute for writes, controls:read for reads, and active or draft parent controls; detail view exposes can_log_execution
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_control_execution/ and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; execution list linked-risk labels use set-based visible_risk_ids redaction
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/control.py ControlCapabilities.can_log_execution, can_view_executions, is_archived, and is_executable
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/ControlDetailPage.tsx and frontend/src/components/executions/

actions.action: Read KRI lists, detail, breaches, due-soon/overdue, and linked vendors
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read plus canonical KRI visibility by department, direct risk ownership, KRI reporting ownership, or linked-control ownership
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/kri.py KRICapabilities on KRIResponse and KRIListResponse collection capabilities including can_create
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a risks:read navigation projection for KRIs; frontend/src/pages/KRIsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/KRIDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/kris/KRIsTableSection.tsx, frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts, and frontend/src/pages/detail/useKriDetailState.ts use backend capabilities and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Create, update, archive, restore, and link vendor-backed KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write or risks:delete depending on action; create requires at least one non-archived parent risk in department scope; department/vendor visibility checked on linked entities
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/kri.py KRICapabilities.can_update, can_update_sensitive_fields, can_request_update_approval, can_archive_immediately, can_request_archive_approval, can_restore, can_link_vendors, can_unlink_vendors, can_create_issue, and KRIListResponse collection can_create
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/KRINewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/KRIDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/KRIsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/kris/KRIsTableSection.tsx, frontend/src/components/linking/LinkSearchResultItem.tsx, and KRI form/list components use backend capabilities; direct create routes load collection capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.action: Submit values, read history, and request corrections
actions.actor_scope: Submit uses ensure_can_submit_value; correction requires risks:write and readable KRI unless privileged approver executes immediately
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/kri.py KRICapabilities and KRIHistoryCapabilities.can_request_correction
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/KRIDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/components/kris/, and frontend/src/pages/detail/useKriDetailState.ts use backend capabilities

actions.action: Request, list, read, approve, reject, cancel, and inspect approval side effects
actions.actor_scope: Requesting uses resource-specific delete/update helpers; scenario-backed approvals use approval scenario snapshots for requires-approval and approver-role policy; legacy approvals without snapshots preserve can_resolve_approvals fallback
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/approval_request.py and backend/app/schemas/__init__.py ApprovalRequestCapabilities plus preserved can_approve and can_reject booleans; approval scenario snapshot fields remain internal
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx exposes approvals navigation to non-platform-admin business users; frontend/src/pages/approvals/ uses ApprovalRequestCapabilities for approve, reject, and cancel actions

actions.action: List, count, mark, and configure current-user notifications plus manual KRI deadline check trigger
actions.actor_scope: Notification reads and counts are current-user scoped and linked-resource filtered; mark-read mutations are current-user ownership scoped; manual KRI deadline trigger requires approval-resolution authority
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/notification_visibility.py applies risk, control, KRI, vendor, approval, and questionnaire visibility helpers; issue-linked notifications require issues:read plus issue visibility scope; creation-time notification recipient loaders use user_selectinload_options(include_permissions=True) before can_read_* checks so manager-derived department scope is available; backend/app/services/kri_deadline_service.py and backend/app/services/questionnaire_deadline_service.py use creation-time visibility gates where available; can_resolve_approvals gates manual KRI deadline trigger
actions.response_capability: None; notification payloads are scoped server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/notifications/ and frontend/src/services/notificationsApi.ts

actions.action: Read vendor lists, details, grouped views, linked risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:read and vendor ownership/department visibility; linked entities require their own read policy
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_vendor_workflow/policy.py and backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/vendors/_listing.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/vendor_link_helpers.py, and backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py for set-based linked-risk redaction
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/vendor.py VendorCapabilities on VendorRead and VendorListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a vendors:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/vendors/ and frontend/src/types/vendor.ts, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts use backend read authority and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Create, update, archive, restore, and mutate vendor links
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:write/delete or vendor-owner exception; edit and link mutations require an active visible vendor and visible target entity; inactive vendors can only be restored when authorized
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/vendor.py VendorCapabilities.can_update, can_archive, can_restore, can_link_risk, can_link_control, can_link_kri, can_create_linked_risk, can_create_linked_control, can_create_linked_kri, and can_create_issue
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/vendors/, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx, and vendor detail tabs use backend capabilities; direct create/edit routes load collection/detail capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.action: Export risks, controls, KRIs, vendors, issues, audit trail, summary, and vendor reports
actions.actor_scope: Requires reports:read plus actor-visible unfiltered rows and strict explicit department and as-of visibility filters; vendor annual/DORA reports require vendor-report role policy and active actor-visible vendors
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/entity_scope_clauses.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/reports/unified_exports/, backend/app/services/vendor_report_policy.py, backend/app/services/_vendor_workflow/policy.py, and report helpers including issue provenance export fields; audit-trail linked-risk redaction uses set-based risk visibility
actions.response_capability: RiskListResponse, ControlListResponse, KRIListResponse, VendorListResponse, and backend/app/schemas/issue.py IssueListResponse collection capabilities expose can_export; backend/app/schemas/execution.py ControlExecutionListResponse exposes capabilities.can_export_csv; GET /api/v1/vendor-reports/capabilities exposes vendor-report download and department-filter booleans; exported rows are filtered server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/KRIsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssuesPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AuditTrailPage.tsx, frontend/src/services/reportApi.ts, frontend/src/services/vendorReportApi.ts, export dialogs, and frontend/src/pages/VendorReportsPage.tsx use backend capability metadata for export visibility

actions.action: Read overview, risk, control, KRI, issue, committee, and quarterly dashboard metrics
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read, issues:read, vendors:read, or committee access depending on endpoint; unfiltered aggregates use actor-visible backend query helpers, including vendor ownership visibility for vendor metrics
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/dashboard.py DashboardOverviewCapabilities on DashboardOverviewResponse; payloads remain scoped server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/policy.ts for route/session projection, frontend/src/services/dashboardApi.ts, frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/dashboard/DashboardHeader.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/dashboard/useDashboardOverviewState.ts use backend DashboardOverviewCapabilities without local issue-permission query-key discriminators

actions.action: Manage roles, permissions, departments, risk types, questionnaire templates, and approval scenarios
actions.actor_scope: CRO-only business configuration; platform admin is not a business-data authority; inactive records expose false update capabilities and reject edits until restored
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py RiskHubCapabilitiesRead, RoleHubCapabilities, DepartmentHubCapabilities, RiskTypeCapabilities, and ApprovalScenarioCapabilities where action metadata is exposed
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/riskhub/, frontend/src/components/riskhub/useRiskHubCapabilities.ts, frontend/src/services/riskHubApi.ts, and frontend/src/pages/RiskHubPage.tsx

actions.action: Read department list, detail, related risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires departments:read plus scoped related-resource permissions where related lists cross domains
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py DepartmentHubCapabilities for Risk Hub department configuration; department detail does not expose action capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a departments:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/DepartmentsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/DepartmentDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useDepartmentDetail.ts, and frontend/src/pages/departments/ render denied/clear stale list data on backend 403

actions.action: Send, open, draft, submit, compare, request clarification, and respond
actions.actor_scope: Canonical risk visibility for reads, narrower questionnaire action policy for inbox/open/draft/submit/respond, and RM/CRO send/clarification policy
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk_questionnaire.py RiskQuestionnaireCapabilities and backend/app/schemas/risk.py RiskCapabilities.can_send_questionnaire
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/risks/risk-questionnaire-detail/, frontend/src/components/risks/RiskDetailQuestionnairesTab.tsx

actions.action: Create, read, update, link, assign, progress, close, approve exceptions, and view issue activity history
actions.actor_scope: Requires issues:read/write/approve plus issue scope, owner assignment, linked-entity visibility helpers, activity history requires activity_log:read and business-view eligibility, active vendor checks for vendor context/link mutations, validated link-backed issue source provenance, protected current source links, set-based linked-resource redaction, and derived context filters
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/issues.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/_shared/source.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/_shared/links.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/_shared/serialization.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; issue list/detail linked risk/control/KRI/vendor labels and risk/vendor contexts are redacted through precomputed visible ID sets
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/issue.py IssueCapabilities including can_view_activity_history, source_display, source_link, and IssueLink.is_source_link metadata on IssueSummary, IssueRead, and IssueListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/issues/, frontend/src/components/issues/, frontend/src/pages/IssuesPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts, frontend/src/pages/detail/ContextualIssueAction.tsx, and frontend/src/components/executions/ use backend capabilities and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Scan, read, quick-view, stats, and resolve orphaned ownership/dependency items
actions.actor_scope: Governance operator access requires non-platform-admin global/privileged business scope with users:write; backend emits per-orphan resolution requirements
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/orphaned_item.py Orphan capabilities: can_resolve, can_view_detail, requires_owner, requires_risk, requires_department
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/policy.ts mirrors governance route eligibility; frontend/src/components/governance/ and frontend/src/pages/GovernancePage.tsx use backend payloads for orphan actions

actions.action: Read activity log, entity types, and actions
actions.actor_scope: Requires activity_log:read and blocks platform admins from business activity views
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/activity_log.py ActivityLogCapabilities on ActivityLogListResponse; response rows remain scoped server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/BusinessRouteGuards.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ActivityLogPage.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActivityLogPageState.ts, and frontend/src/components/activity-log/ActivityLogFilterBar.tsx

actions.action: Authenticate, refresh, bootstrap session, read auth config, read platform admin capabilities/logs, and revoke sessions
actions.actor_scope: Session authority is backend JWT/refresh/session version; admin session revocation and structured log reads are platform-admin-only
actions.response_capability: GET /api/v1/admin/capabilities exposes admin-console action metadata; session/user permissions are returned through auth/bootstrap responses, not per-business-action capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx and frontend/src/services/session/, frontend/src/authz/useAuthz.ts, frontend/src/authz/policy.ts, frontend/src/hooks/usePermissions.ts, frontend/src/lib/capabilities.ts, frontend/src/routing/, frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AdminConsolePage.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ use route/session projection plus backend admin capabilities for admin action buttons; business route navigation read projections mirror backend read guards and are route-context validated by scripts/security/validate_authz_capability_contract.py

actions.action: Read admin-console action capabilities and render session, directory, log-config, and loaded-audit-log client actions
actions.actor_scope: Platform-admin-only route; non-admin users receive 403 from the capability endpoint and existing admin action endpoints
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/admin.py AdminConsoleCapabilities with can_revoke_sessions, can_run_directory_check_all, can_update_log_config, and can_export_loaded_audit_logs
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ops/SessionsPanel.tsx, frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ops/SessionsTable.tsx, frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/audit/AuditLogsPanel.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/audit/LogSettingsPanel.tsx hide action controls when admin capabilities are missing or false
